headline: Ford vs Winnebago: How Two American Vehicle Makers Are Navigating a Tough Road Ahead
summary: Ford (NYSE: F) just wrapped Q4 2025 with a headline-grabbing $11.10 billion GAAP net loss driven by $15.50 billion in special charges, while Winnebago (NYSE: WGO) reported a Q1 FY2026 earnings surprise that flipped it from a $0.03 adjusted loss a year ago to $0.38 adjusted EPS. Two American vehicle makers, two very different recovery ... Ford vs Winnebago: How Two American Vehicle Makers Are Navigating a Tough Road Ahead

headline: Ford and Bread Financial Accelerate Customer Benefits with New Financing Program— Unlocking Enhanced Experiences and Exclusive Loyalty Rewards
summary: Ford Rewards Visa Signature® Credit Card Bread Financial and Ford today announced the new Ford Rewards Visa Signature® Credit Card.
